Class RaceCarDBManager

java.lang.Object
RaceCarManager
RaceCarDBManager
public class RaceCarDBManager extends RaceCarManager
This child class contains business logic to perform CRUD operations to the RaceCar database. It also performs a special function to simulate a race for cars. This drives the backend of the system as it performs all necessary action to complete CRUD functionality.

    Constructors

    Description

    Initializes the manager with no connection and a query helper.

  • Constructor Details

    • RaceCarDBManager

      public RaceCarDBManager()
      Initializes the manager with no connection and a query helper. The query helper (raceCarTable) handles database operations in SQL.

  • Method Details

    • getConnection

      public Connection getConnection()
      This method gets the connection value.
      Returns:
      Connection value of connection

    • setConnection

      public void setConnection(Connection connection)
      This method sets the value of connection the parameter.
      Parameters:
      connection - established connection of a database

    • getRaceCarTable

      public RaceCars getRaceCarTable()
      This method gets the value of raceCarTable.
      Returns:
      RaceCars the service that allows database operations

    • setRaceCarTable

      public void setRaceCarTable(RaceCars raceCarTable)
      This method sets the value of RaceCarTable to the parameter.
      Parameters:
      raceCarTable - the service that allows database operations

    • loadRaceCarDB

      public boolean loadRaceCarDB(String filePath)
      This establishes connection to the database.
      Parameters:
      filePath - the file path of the sample database
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value to determine if operation was successful

    • addRaceCar

      public boolean addRaceCar(RaceCar raceCar)
      This method adds a race car object to the database.
      Parameters:
      raceCar - object representing the race car
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value to determine if operation was successful

    • removeRaceCar

      public boolean removeRaceCar(int vehicleID)
      This method removes a race car from the database.
      Parameters:
      vehicleID - the id of the car the user wants to remove
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value to determine if the operation was successful

    • updateRaceCar

      public boolean updateRaceCar(int id, String make, String model, int year, double topSpeed, boolean hasLaunched)
      This method performs updates to the database, modifying existing information.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the car
      make - the make of the car
      model - the model of the car
      year - the year that the car was made
      topSpeed - the top speed that the car can perform
      hasLaunched - the boolean value that represents the launch status of the car
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value that determines if the operation was successful

    • getRaceCars

      public ArrayList<RaceCar> getRaceCars()
      This method converts a SQL select query into an array list.
      Overrides:
      getRaceCars in class RaceCarManager
      Returns:
      the result of the query as an array list

    • launchRaceCars

      public RaceCar launchRaceCars(RaceCar raceCar1, RaceCar raceCar2)
      This method simulates a race between two cars.
      Parameters:
      raceCar1 - the first car to be raced
      raceCar2 - the second car to be raced against
      Returns:
      RaceCar the winner of the race

    • idValid

      public boolean idValid(int id)
      This method performs validation of the vehicle id. This checks if there is an existing id or if there is a non-negative number.
      Parameters:
      id - the id to be checked
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value to determine if the id was valid

    • hasConnection

      public boolean hasConnection()
      This method checks if the class has a connection.
      Returns:
      boolean true or false value to determine if there is a connection
